_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v20 Core build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05162026/v20_plan.txt §3. v20 forks v19 floors verbatim except for the two regressed axes ATE and RCM, whose floors are lifted to track the count_max 3500 -> 5500 bump documented in v20_plan.txt §2.1. The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

_provenance.rationale: v20 raises the per-template count_max ceiling for the Core build only (3500 -> 5500); ATE and RCM templates have no per-template Count: directive and were saturating the 3500 ceiling in v19. The two affected axis floors are bumped proportionally (v19 actuals: ATE 16,967, RCM 28,772; v20 expected: ATE ~26,500, RCM ~45,000). All other axes have explicit per-template Count: ceilings or substrate-bounded yields and carry v19 floors verbatim.

axes._note: Carried from v18.1 verbatim. v18 declared 13000 / floor 11700 over fragmented AB.RMS.{4,5} paraphrases. v18p1 consolidated to single-template AB.RMS.{4,5} Count: 600 each (matches v9_rms / v7); the post-dedup tail lands ~12.2K so the floor is set to 12000.

v20 delta vs v19. v19 actual under count_max=3500: 16,967 (target 13,000 / floor 12,500). v20 raises count_max -> 5500 (see v20_plan.txt §2.1); ATE templates have no per-template Count: directive and saturate the ceiling. Expected v20 actual: ~26,500 (linear scaling from the v19 saturation rate). Target raised to 24,000; floor raised to 22,000 to keep ~10% headroom on the new yield.

Carried from v18.1 verbatim. AB.VSP.{1..4} and V.CPE.{1..4} capped at Count: 1500 each (matches v10's 4*1500 + 4*1500 = 12K shape that posted VSP 86.7); the post-dedup tail lands ~6K so the floor is set to 5400 (10% headroom).

v20 delta vs v19. v19 actual under count_max=3500: 28,772 (target 10,000 / floor 9,000). v20 raises count_max -> 5500 (see v20_plan.txt §2.1); RCM templates have no per-template Count: directive and saturate the ceiling. Expected v20 actual: ~45,000 (linear scaling from the v19 saturation rate). Target raised to 40,000; floor raised to 36,000 to keep ~10% headroom on the new yield.

Carried from v18.1 verbatim. v18p1 dropped AB.MCQ.EXT.{MITRE,SEC,GLOSS}.1 and reverted to scenario-only AB.MCQ.{1..6} + JS.MCQ.{1,2,5} (matches v8small CKT 77.6 ~6K shape). Three new scenario-shape templates AB.MCQ.7 (mw->ap; Count 800), AB.MCQ.8 (grp->mw; Count 500), AB.MCQ.9 (sub->parent; Count 800) were added in v18p1 to clear the 6000 floor.
